## What

One sentence on what changes in this PR.

## Why

What problem does this solve? Link to issue / discussion / RFC if any.

## Tests

- [ ] New behavior has tests.
- [ ] If this changes upstream-vector behavior, the change is recorded in `Tests/Vectors/EXCEPTIONS.md` per [RFC-0002](../rfcs/0002-test-parity-policy.md).

## Conventions

- [ ] Public API matches [RFC-0001](../rfcs/0001-api-conventions.md).
- [ ] DocC updated if public API changed.
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added.
